transfer.trash: {countText} {count, plural, one {bestand} other {bestanden}} naar de prullenmand verplaatst
transfer.movedPhrase: {kind, select, both {{filesText} {files, plural, one {bestand} other {bestanden}} en {foldersText} {folders, plural, one {map} other {mappen}}} foldersOnly {{foldersText} {folders, plural, one {map} other {mappen}}} other {{filesText} {files, plural, one {bestand} other {bestanden}}}}
transfer.split.skipped: {verb, select, copy {{phrase} gekopieerd} other {{phrase} verplaatst}}, {skippedText} {skipped, plural, one {bestand} other {bestanden}} overgeslagen (al op de bestemming).
transfer.fileOnly.allDone: {verb, select, copy {Kopiëren} other {Verplaatsen}} voltooid: {transferredText} {transferred, plural, one {bestand} other {bestanden}} {verb, select, copy {gekopieerd} other {verplaatst}}.
